pr.title: Print trophies and event matches in Ninja build
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Enabled the fancy Ninja build progress output for Melee-specific milestones, mapping code progress to "Trophies" and data progress to "Event Matches", and adjusted the printed wording from "out of / collected" to "of / completed". The PR explicitly resolves issue #1188. Evidence is limited to a small diff and no review discussion.

key_files.reason: Adds project-specific fancy progress configuration: enables fancy progress and sets code/data labels and denominators.
Changes the human-readable fancy progress message generated by print_category.

what_changed: Added a new Progress configuration block in configure.py.
Changed the fancy progress output string in tools/project.py from "You have X out of Y ... and collected X out of Y ..." to "You have X of Y ... and completed X of Y ...".
smart_moves: Used existing configurable progress hooks instead of hardcoding Melee-specific labels directly into the project tool logic.
Kept the project-specific quantities and labels in configure.py, leaving tools/project.py generic.
Chose domain-relevant progress metaphors, trophies for code progress and event matches for data progress, making Ninja output more understandable for contributors.
decomp_lessons: Build progress presentation can be customized per project through configure.py without affecting matching or source reconstruction.
When adding flavor text or project-specific progress metrics, keep labels and fractions in configuration and keep shared tooling generic.
Small tooling PRs can improve contributor feedback loops even when they do not affect decompilation match status.
naming_conventions: Fancy progress settings use the config.progress_* prefix.
Code-side fancy progress uses config.progress_code_fancy_frac and config.progress_code_fancy_item.
Data-side fancy progress uses config.progress_data_fancy_frac and config.progress_data_fancy_item.
User-facing item labels are title-cased strings such as "Trophies" and "Event Matches".
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs modifying config.progress_use_fancy or fancy progress labels.
Search issue #1188 for the original request and desired Ninja progress behavior.
Check whether trophy and event match totals changed after PR #1279 and required updates to progress_code_fancy_frac or progress_data_fancy_frac.
